title: June 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 8''' is the 159th day of the year (160th in leap years), with 206 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Paul Youll|Paul]] and [[Stephen Youll]] are born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 103|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 103]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 1]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 3|''Poe Dameron'' 3]] published.
*2016 – [[Darth Vader (2015) 21|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 21]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 19|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 19]] published in Germany.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 2 — Target Valance]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Hyperspace|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Hyperspace]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Krrsantan: Star Wars Tales 1|''Krrsantan: Star Wars Tales'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 24|''Star Wars'' (2020) 24]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Switch|Nintendo Switch]].
*2022 – [[Part IV]] episode of [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'']] released.
